records.label: T1.1  Hall fraction 2/9 = p/q with p = 2, q = 9 (target identity)
records.detail: nu = 2/9; p = 2, q = 9; gcd(2, 9) = 1 (coprime).

records.label: T1.2  gcd(p, q) = gcd(2, 9) = 1 (lowest-terms requirement)
records.detail: FQHE Laughlin / Jain forms require coprime p, q.

records.label: T1.3  q = 9 is ODD (compatible with fermionic FQHE q-odd rule)
records.detail: Fermionic Laughlin: q odd. q = 9 = 2*4 + 1 with n = 4.

records.label: T1.4  nu = 2/9 = 2/(2*2*n + 1) at n = 2 (Jain hierarchy IS realized)
records.detail: Jain composite-fermion solution: n = 2 flux pairs attached.

records.label: T1.5  Cl(3)/Z^3 framework has NO continuous T^2 TBC moduli
records.detail: Z_3 is discrete (3 elements); no 2-parameter family of phases.

records.label: T1.6  Physical base K_norm^+ / C_3 = open interval (R2 obstruction)
records.detail: Cannot host 2-cycle T^2 needed for NTW integral.

records.label: T1.7  Cl(3)/Z^3 cyclic generation = abelian Z_3 (no Heisenberg cocycle)
records.detail:
Z_3 is commutative; FQHE needs the non-commutative magnetic translation
algebra (Heisenberg-Weyl with phi-flux cocycle).

records.label: T1.8  Framework supplies degeneracy (3 gens) but NOT T^2 base or noncommuting TBC
records.detail: Two of three NTW prerequisites are absent.

records.label: T2.1  Jain hierarchy: nu = p/(2pn + 1) = 2/9 at p = 2, n = 2
records.detail: nu = 2/9; standard Jain construction with 4 flux quanta attached.

records.label: T2.2  Flux attachment number 2n = 4 (n = 2 in Jain hierarchy)
records.detail: CF construction: 4 flux quanta attached per electron.

records.label: T2.3  CF effective filling p = 2 (integer; composite-fermion IQHE)
records.detail: Composite fermions fill p = 2 Landau levels integrally.

records.label: T2.4  Cl(3)/Z^3 retained content has NO magnetic field B
records.detail:
No retained spatial gauge background; U(1)_Y is gauge-natural
but does not specify a flux density.

records.label: T2.5  Cl(3)/Z^3 retained action has NO Chern-Simons term
records.detail:
Retained action lanes (Hilbert-Einstein, gauge kinetic, Yukawa,
Higgs, CP-conjugate) -- no Chern-Simons term retained.

records.label: T2.6  Cl(3)/Z^3 has NO continuous Landau-level spectrum
records.detail:
Generation-space spectrum is 3 discrete eigenvalues (lepton masses);
no continuous LL ladder.

records.label: T2.7  Arithmetic Jain identity p/(2pn+1) = 2/9 holds at (p,n)=(2,2)
records.detail: Pure arithmetic; no retained physical CF mechanism on Cl(3)/Z^3.

records.label: T2.8  Arithmetic CF match does NOT yield a structural framework derivation
records.detail:
Three physical CF ingredients (B, CS, LL) all absent; arithmetic alone
is no different from the Plancherel-tautology obstruction (no-go C).

records.label: T3.1  Laughlin nu = 1/3: anyon statistics theta = pi/3 (rational * pi)
records.detail: theta = pi/3; rational multiple of pi.

records.label: T3.2  Z_3 anyon charge q = 1/3 (pure rational)
records.detail: Standard parafermion Z_3 anyon charge = 1/3.

records.label: T3.3  Arithmetic 2 * (1/9) = 2/9 (pure rationals)
records.detail: 2 * 1/9 = 2/9; same arithmetic as character / Plancherel.

records.label: T3.4  Cl(3)/Z^3 framework has NO retained Z_9 hierarchical anyon
records.detail: Generation Z_3 is single Z_3; no second retained Z_3 to combine to Z_9.

records.label: T3.5  Z_9 anyon statistics theta = pi/9 (rational * pi), not 2/9
T3.6  Z_3 generation symmetry acts on flavor (not 2D space); no spatial braiding
records.detail:
Generation index is 0-D (label, not coordinate); FQHE braiding
requires 2D spatial worldlines.

records.label: T3.7  Anyon charge OR statistics route fails to yield 2/9 as pure-rational radian
records.detail: Charge: pure rational 1/3 (not radian). Statistics: rational * pi (not pure rational).

records.label: T4.1  Circulant Yukawa moduli (a real, b complex) has real dim = 3, not 2
records.detail: a in R (1 dof), b in C (2 dof); total 3 dof.

records.label: T4.2  After Z_3 phase quotient on b, moduli is R^2, not T^2
records.detail: (a, |b|) lives in R x R+ -- not compact; not a 2-torus.

records.label: T4.3  Physical base K_norm^+ / C_3 is open interval (NOT T^2)
records.detail: Verified in KOIDE_BERRY_BUNDLE_OBSTRUCTION_THEOREM_NOTE_2026-04-19.md.

records.label: T4.4  No retained compactification (a, |b|) -> T^2
records.detail: (a, |b|) is the natural retained moduli; no retained T^2 wrapping.

records.label: T4.5  Even on a constructed T^2 of phases, NO Heisenberg cocycle is retained
records.detail:
FQHE NTW integrand requires non-commuting magnetic translations.
Cl(3)/Z^3 has only abelian flavor / generation Z_3.

records.label: T4.6  Trivial phase-torus state has zero Berry curvature -> Chern = 0
records.detail:
A_+ = 1/3, F = 0, integral = Chern = 0.
Single-particle state on (theta_+, theta_-) torus has flat connection.

records.label: T4.7  Numerical NTW integration on trivial state: Chern = 0
records.detail: Numerical integral = 0.000000e+00; trivial connection -> 0.

records.label: T4.8  No retained interaction Hamiltonian on generation moduli forces Chern = 2
records.detail:
Yukawa generation-space dynamics is single-particle (lepton bilinear);
FQHE Chern = 2 needs explicit two-body interaction.

records.label: T5.1  Cl(3)/Z^3 has 3-fold generation degeneracy (analog GSD = 3)
records.detail: Three generations on the Z_3 cyclic structure.

records.label: T5.2  FQHE GSD on T^2 for nu = 2/9 would be q = 9 (mismatch with framework's 3)
records.detail: FQHE GSD = 9; framework natural degeneracy = 3.

records.label: T5.3  Cl(3)/Z^3 has only one Z_3, no retained Z_3 x Z_3 = Z_9
records.detail: Generation Z_3 is single; no second cyclic factor retained.

records.label: T5.4  Cl(3)/Z^3 has NO retained modular SL(2, Z) action on moduli
records.detail: FQHE T-matrix and S-matrix are modular invariants; no analog retained.

records.label: T5.5  No retained topological entanglement entropy on generation moduli
records.detail:
TEE gamma = log(sqrt(sum d_i^2)) requires anyon spectrum;
framework has only abelian generation labels.

records.label: T5.6  Generation index is 0-D label; anyon braiding requires 2D spatial
records.detail: Generations are flavor labels; no spatial worldline support.

records.label: T6.1  Symmetric ground state |Psi> has unit norm
records.detail: <Psi|Psi> = 1.

records.label: T6.2  Symmetric state Berry connections A_k = 1/3 (flat)
records.detail: A_1 = A_2 = A_3 = 1/3; flat (constant).

records.label: T6.3  Berry curvature F_ij = 0 (flat connection)
records.detail: F_12 = F_13 = F_23 = 0; symmetric state has zero curvature.

records.label: T6.4  NTW integral over phase torus = 0 (NOT 2)
records.detail: Symmetric / Z_3-invariant state cannot host Chern = 2.

records.label: T6.5  Z_3-equivariant linear-phase state still has Chern = 0
records.detail:
Linear phases preserve flat connection; NON-LINEAR phases
require explicit interaction not retained on Cl(3)/Z^3.

records.label: T6.6  Numerical Chern integral on (theta_+, theta_-) torus: 0
records.detail: Numerical integral = 0.000000e+00; symmetric flat state has Chern = 0.

records.label: T6.7  Natural NTW Chern number = 0, target = 2: MISMATCH
records.detail: Natural = 0; required for nu = 2/9 with q = 9 GSD: 2.

records.label: T7  ABSENT on Cl(3)/Z^3: (i)   2D spatial system
records.detail: Required for FQHE; not retained on framework.

records.label: T7  ABSENT on Cl(3)/Z^3: (ii)  Magnetic field B
records.detail: Required for FQHE; not retained on framework.

records.label: T7  ABSENT on Cl(3)/Z^3: (iii) Landau-level spectrum
records.detail: Required for FQHE; not retained on framework.

records.label: T7  ABSENT on Cl(3)/Z^3: (iv)  Strong e-e interactions
records.detail: Required for FQHE; not retained on framework.

records.label: T7  ABSENT on Cl(3)/Z^3: (v)   Non-commuting magnetic translations
records.detail: Required for FQHE; not retained on framework.

records.label: T7  ABSENT on Cl(3)/Z^3: (vi)  Continuous T^2 of TBC
records.detail: Required for FQHE; not retained on framework.

records.label: T7  ABSENT on Cl(3)/Z^3: (viii) Composite-fermion / flux attachment
records.detail: Required for FQHE; not retained on framework.

records.label: T7  ABSENT on Cl(3)/Z^3: (ix)  Anyonic quasiparticle statistics
records.detail: Required for FQHE; not retained on framework.

records.label: T7  ABSENT on Cl(3)/Z^3: (x)   Topological entanglement entropy
records.detail: Required for FQHE; not retained on framework.

records.label: T7  PARTIAL on Cl(3)/Z^3: (vii) many-body GSD = 3 (not 9 = q)
records.detail: Three generations give 3-fold candidate; FQHE nu = 2/9 needs q = 9.

records.label: T7  ARITHMETIC-ONLY: Jain pattern p=2, q=9, n=2 holds without retained mechanism
records.detail: Integer arithmetic only; no retained flux attachment / Chern-Simons.

records.label: T8.1  FQHE-analog hypothesis closes radian-bridge P: NO
records.detail:
All FQHE-style routes hit either pure-rational (charge / character) or
rational * pi (anyon statistics / monodromies). Pure-rational radian
without retained pi-bridge remains absent.

records.label: T8.2  7 of 10 FQHE ingredients absent; 1 partial; 2 arithmetic-only
records.detail: Absent: 7; partial: 1; arithmetic: 2.

records.label: T8.3  Jain arithmetic match (p,n)=(2,2) holds but lacks retained mechanism
records.detail: Integer identity 2/(2*2*2 + 1) = 2/9; no retained CF / CS / LL ingredients.

records.label: T8.4  No new structural input delivered beyond no-go-note (a),(b),(c)
records.detail: FQHE-analog reduces to the same Plancherel / character tautology obstruction.

fqhe_routes_tested: Z_3 / Z_9 anyon charge and statistics
Direct symbolic NTW integration on framework
arithmetic_only_matches: GSD candidate from 3 generations (3, not q=9)
obstruction_class: Plancherel-tautology (no-go candidate C); Jain arithmetic does not promote to retained mechanism
minimal_missing_inputs: non-commuting translation pair on moduli (Heisenberg cocycle)
explicit interaction Hamiltonian on three generations
retained Z_9 = Z_3 x Z_3 refinement
